faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom website?
faqs.answer: The timeline depends on the project complexity. A simple website takes 4-6 weeks, while complex web applications may take 3-6 months. We provide a detailed timeline during the discovery phase.

faqs.question: What technologies do you use for web development?
faqs.answer: We specialize in React.js, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. For CMS, we use WordPress and Strapi. We choose the best tech stack based on your project requirements.

faqs.question: Do you provide website maintenance and support?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 maintenance and support services including security updates, performance optimization, content updates, and technical support.

faqs.question: Is your web development SEO-friendly?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! All our websites are built with SEO best practices including server-side rendering, optimized Core Web Vitals, structured data, and mobile-first design.

faqs.question: What is your development process?
faqs.answer: We follow an agile development methodology with 2-week sprints. Our process includes discovery, design, development, testing, deployment, and ongoing support with regular client demos and feedback sessions.

faqs.question: Do you offer custom web development services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in custom web development tailored to your specific business requirements. We build bespoke solutions from scratch using modern technologies and best practices.

cta.title: Ready to Build Something Great?
cta.description: 2-week sprints with continuous integration and regular client demos.

faqs.question: How long does the website design process take?
faqs.answer: The timeline depends on the project complexity. A simple website design takes 2-3 weeks, while complex designs with extensive UX research may take 4-6 weeks.

faqs.question: What design tools do you use?
faqs.answer: We primarily use Figma and Adobe XD for designing, along with Photoshop and Illustrator for graphic elements. We also use InVision and Zeplin for design handoff.

faqs.question: Do you provide design revisions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide multiple revision rounds to ensure the design perfectly matches your vision. Our professional and enterprise packages include unlimited revisions.

faqs.question: Do you create mobile-responsive designs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! All our designs are mobile-first and fully responsive, ensuring an optimal experience across all devices.

faqs.question: What is the timeline for custom web development?

faqs.question: Which e-commerce platform do you recommend?
faqs.answer: We recommend based on your specific needs. Shopify for ease of use, WooCommerce for WordPress integration, Magento for enterprise-scale, and custom solutions for unique requirements.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build an e-commerce store?
faqs.answer: Timeline varies based on complexity. A basic store takes 4-8 weeks, while custom solutions may take 3-6 months. We provide detailed timeline estimates during planning.

faqs.question: Do you provide payment gateway integration?
faqs.answer: Yes, we integrate multiple payment gateways including Stripe, PayPal, Razorpay, and region-specific payment providers.

faqs.question: Is my e-commerce store secure?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We implement SSL encryption, PCI compliance, secure authentication, and regular security audits to ensure your store is fully secure.

faqs.question: Which CMS platform is best for my business?
faqs.answer: We recommend based on your needs. WordPress for content-heavy sites, custom CMS for unique requirements, and headless CMS for omnichannel content delivery.

faqs.question: Can you customize WordPress?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in WordPress customization including custom themes, plugins, and functionality extensions.

faqs.question: What is headless CMS?
faqs.answer: A headless CMS separates content management from presentation, allowing content to be delivered through APIs to any device or platform.

faqs.question: Is my content secure in the CMS?
faqs.answer: Yes, we implement robust security measures including user authentication, role-based access, and regular security updates.
